secret.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing TLS certificates

cert_chain_file.description: Path to the certificate chain PEM file (alternative to secret)

private_key_file.description: Path to the private key PEM file (alternative to secret)

ca_secret.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing CA certificates for client verification

cert_required.description: Whether client TLS certificates are required (mTLS)

redirect_cleartext_from.description: Port number from which to redirect cleartext traffic to TLS

sni.description: SNI hostname to present for outbound TLS connections

ambassador_id.description: Ambassador IDs that should use this TLSContext
